prompt: Using the compliant model, I need Year 3 EBITDA to be at least $3,500,000. What does the Year 1 revenue need to be to hit that target? Find the exact input value.
assertions: Iterates using the write → recalculate → read pattern multiple times to converge on the answer
Writes Inp_Rev_Y1 values via idfa-ops write command (not manual cell edits)
Reads EBITDA_Y3 via idfa-ops read command after each recalculation
Converges to a solution within 1% tolerance of the $3,500,000 target
Leaves the final solved value written in the model (does NOT revert to the original 10M)
Reports the required Inp_Rev_Y1 value and the resulting EBITDA_Y3, both read from the model
